deep_dive.title: Sensing-Aided Channel Estimation for Near-Field MIMO ISAC Systems via Cross-Attention Transformer
deep_dive.abstract: Near-field integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) can deliver the high spatial resolution and transmission capability with the shared spectrum and hardware. Due to the partial overlap between communication scatterers and radar targets, the sensing information can provide valuable priors to enhance the channel estimation while fusing the two heterogeneous modalities remain challenging. To address this problem, a Cross-Attention Transformer based Channel Estimation Neural Network (CAT-CENet) is developed, which includes a communication pilot branch generating the the Key and Value features and a sensing information branch generating the Query feature. By elaborating the three-module structure, CAT-CENet can focus on features of overlapped targets automatically without need of identifying them in advance. The modality contribution is theoretically analyzed based on the Shapley value to verify the cross-attention gain achieved by CAT-CENet. Simulation results show that CAT-CENet outperforms the state-of-the-art schemes, especially with the higher overlapping proportion, and is robust to the model pruning.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: cross-attention transformer for channel estimation in near-field MIMO ISAC
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 交叉注意力变压器用于近场MIMO ISAC信道估计
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 交叉注意力变压器用于近场MIMO ISAC信道估计
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 交叉注意力变压器用于近场MIMO ISAC信道估计
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: CAT-CENet uses a cross-attention transformer to fuse sensing information with communication pilots for channel estimation in near-field MIMO ISAC systems, outperforming traditional methods.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对近场集成感知与通信系统中信道估计的难题，提出了一种基于交叉注意力变压器的信道估计神经网络CAT-CENet。该方法利用感知信息提供先验，通过交叉注意力机制融合通信导频分支和感知信息分支的特征，有效解决了异构模态融合的挑战。实验表明，所提方法在信道估计精度上优于现有方案。

deep_dive.title: Shift-MoE-Based DJSCC for CSI Feedback in Multi-User Pinching-Antenna Systems
deep_dive.abstract: In frequency-division duplexing systems, the performance gains of pinching-antenna systems (PASS) critically depend on accurate channel state information (CSI) at the base station. However, PASS CSI exhibits structured correlations over the waveguide-antenna grid and pronounced heterogeneity across users, making conventional fixed feedback mappings difficult to generalize. To address this challenge, this letter proposes an end-to-end CSI feedback scheme over a noisy uplink feedback link based on deep joint source-channel coding, termed Shift-based Mixture-of-Experts (Shift-MoE). Specifically, Shift-MoE leverages channel-grouped one-step shift operations to capture grid dependencies without global attention, and employs a gated multilayer perceptron mixture-of-experts module to adapt to heterogeneous CSI statistics across users. Numerical results demonstrate that the proposed Shift-MoE consistently outperforms representative learning-based CSI feedback baselines in normalized mean squared error and remains effective under different system parameter settings.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: deep joint source-channel coding for CSI feedback in pinching-antenna systems
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于深度联合源信道编码的CSI反馈方案
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于深度联合源信道编码的CSI反馈方案
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于深度联合源信道编码的CSI反馈方案
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Shift-MoE-based DJSCC for CSI feedback in multi-user pinching-antenna systems, leveraging channel-grouped shift operations to capture grid correlations.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对钉扎天线系统中信道状态信息反馈的异构性问题，提出基于移位混合专家（Shift-MoE）的深度联合源信道编码方案。该方法通过信道分组的单步移位操作捕获波导天线网格依赖关系，并采用门控多层感知机实现高效反馈。实验表明该方案在噪声反馈信道上优于传统方法，直接服务于通信信道建模与反馈。

deep_dive.title: Bridging the Semantic Gap in 6G: Tiny Language Models Under the Latency-Accuracy-Size Trilemma
deep_dive.abstract: Sixth-generation (6G) wireless networks are expected to serve as AI-native infrastructure, transmitting meaning rather than mere bits -- a shift that makes semantic communication the central paradigm for next-generation connectivity. Deep learning-based semantic encoders show compelling gains in bandwidth efficiency; however, their dependence on large transformer models with hundreds of millions of parameters is at odds with the sub-millisecond latency, microjoule energy budgets, and kilobyte memory footprints of the constrained IoT and edge devices that will dominate 6G endpoints. Tiny language models (t-LMs) -- compact, quantised, task-specialised models deployable on microcontrollers, mobile system-on-chips, and edge accelerators -- are the enabling technology for closing this gap. This review provides a unified treatment of (i) the theoretical foundations of semantic information, covering semantic entropy, channel capacity, and rate-distortion theory; (ii) a two-axis taxonomy of t-LM-based semantic communication systems across five architecture classes and six compression paradigms; (iii) a survey of model compression techniques -- quantisation, pruning, knowledge distillation, low-rank adaptation, split computing, and neural architecture search -- through the lens of semantic quality preservation; and (iv) semantic-aware resource allocation frameworks for 6G multi-user networks. Evidence across the surveyed literature shows that compression can reduce semantic encoder size by up to 99.98% while preserving task accuracy, that split computing achieves device-side encoders with as few as 640 parameters, and that knowledge graph integration cuts transmission energy by 65%. Seven open challenges are identified, spanning theoretical gaps, system design, knowledge-base management, post-quantum security, and hardware co-design, with a 3GPP standardisation roadmap toward IMT-2030.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: tiny language models for 6G semantic communication under latency-accuracy-size trilemma
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向6G语义通信的微小语言模型解决延迟-精度-大小三难问题
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向6G语义通信的微小语言模型解决延迟-精度-大小三难问题
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向6G语义通信的微小语言模型解决延迟-精度-大小三难问题
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Explores tiny language models for 6G semantic communication to enable efficient, low-latency, and constrained-device-friendly neural encoding.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对6G网络中语义通信对终端设备资源受限的需求，本文研究微小语言模型（t-LM）在语义编码中的应用。通过模型压缩、量化和任务特化，t-LM可在微秒延迟、微焦能耗和千字节内存下运行，解决延迟-精度-大小三难问题。实验表明t-LM能在保持语义保真度的同时满足边缘设备约束，为未来通信系统提供了高效的神经网络设计方案。

deep_dive.title: A Sheaf-Theoretic Framework for Distributed Multi-Site Channel Charting
deep_dive.abstract: Channel charting (CC) enables data-driven user localization in wireless networks by embedding channel state information (CSI) into low-dimensional representations. In multi-cell scenarios, each base station independently learns a local chart via neural encoders, leading to misaligned representation spaces across overlapping coverage areas. This lack of consistency hinders network-level tasks such as user tracking, handover prediction, and resource allocation. To address this issue, we propose a principled framework for multi-site channel charting based on topological signal processing. We model the collection of local charts as a network sheaf, which encodes consistency constraints across the network and enables the coherent integration of locally learned representations into a shared global structure. This formulation introduces an interpretable inductive bias that promotes alignment across base stations while preserving local geometric fidelity. Building on this model, we develop a multi-site channel charting architecture and an alternating optimization algorithm that jointly updates neural encoders and inter-site orthogonal transport maps, with theoretical guarantees on consistency. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, demonstrating improved cross-site alignment without degrading the quality of local embeddings.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Sheaf-theoretic framework for multi-site channel charting using neural encoders
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用神经编码器的层论框架用于多站点信道图表
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用神经编码器的层论框架用于多站点信道图表
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用神经编码器的层论框架用于多站点信道图表
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a sheaf-theoretic framework integrating local neural charts from multiple base stations for consistent channel charting, enabling coherent user localization across overlapping coverage areas via topological constraints.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对多基站信道图表中局部神经编码器表示空间不一致的问题，提出基于层论的分布式框架，将各基站学习的本地图表建模为网络层，通过一致性约束实现跨覆盖区域的用户定位协同。该方法利用拓扑信号处理，无需额外通信开销即可融合局部特征，在用户跟踪和切换预测等网络级任务上优于独立图表方法。

deep_dive.title: Semantic Video Communication via Multi-Scale Convolution and Dynamic Routing for Next-Generation Networks
deep_dive.abstract: The exponential growth of video traffic demands novel semantic communication paradigms that transmit meaning rather than raw bits. We present a generative AI-enabled framework for semantic video communication addressing two critical challenges: efficient hierarchical temporal modeling for bandwidth-constrained transmission and robust semantic alignment between video content and natural language queries at network edge devices. Our approach introduces a multi-scale temporal convolutional encoder that captures motion patterns across different temporal granularities with O(T) complexity suitable for resource-constrained IoT deployments. We further propose a capsule-based dynamic routing mechanism that iteratively refines segment-query associations, enabling flexible modeling of non-monotonic semantic alignments essential for goal-oriented communication. These components are unified through a multi-task learning objective optimizing temporal boundary regression, cross-modal alignment, and capsule diversity. Experiments on ActivityNet Captions demonstrate significant improvements, achieving 42.9% Recall@0.5 and 41.1% mean IoU while maintaining computational efficiency critical for edge deployment.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: semantic video communication with multi-scale convolution and dynamic routing for next-gen networks
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向下一代网络的语义视频通信，采用多尺度卷积和动态路由

deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a generative AI-based semantic video communication framework using multi-scale temporal convolution and capsule-based dynamic routing for efficient transmission.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对视频流量的指数增长和带宽受限问题，本文提出一种生成式AI驱动的语义视频通信框架。采用多尺度时间卷积编码器高效捕获运动模式，并引入胶囊动态路由机制实现视频内容与自然语言查询的语义对齐。该方法在资源受限的IoT部署中具有O(T)复杂度，实验证明其在带宽效率和语义保真度上优于传统方案。

quick_skim.title: Cognitive Digital Twins for Self-Aware Channel Estimation
quick_skim.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML)-based channel estimators silently degrade when propagation conditions drift from their training distributions. This letter proposes a model-agnostic cognitive digital twin (CDT) framework that combines a variational autoencoder (VAE) with latent activation monitoring to detect distribution drift and autonomously execute \textsc{continue}, \textsc{update}, or \textsc{retire} lifecycle actions without requiring ground-truth channel knowledge. The proposed framework is fully compatible with the AI-native lifecycle management envisioned in 3rd Generation Partnership Project (3GPP). Simulations over various channels demonstrate accurate drift detection and robust channel estimation, consistently outperforming conventional offline-trained deep learning estimators under moderate and severe channel drift.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: neural network based channel estimation with VAE and digital twin
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用VAE和数字孪生的神经网络信道估计
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用VAE和数字孪生的神经网络信道估计
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用VAE和数字孪生的神经网络信道估计
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a model-agnostic cognitive digital twin framework that uses a VAE with latent monitoring to detect distribution drift and autonomously manage channel estimator lifecycle, improving robustness.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有基于AI的信道估计器在传播条件变化时性能会退化。本文提出一种与模型无关的认知数字孪生框架，结合变分自编码器和潜在激活监控来检测分布漂移，并自主执行继续、更新或退役操作，无需真实信道标签。实验表明该方法能准确检测漂移，并在多种信道下实现鲁棒的信道估计，性能优于传统方案。该框架兼容3GPP的AI原生生命周期管理，为信道估计的自适应维护提供了新思路。

quick_skim.title: Physics-Informed Direction-of-Arrival Estimation Over Distributed Edge Devices
quick_skim.abstract: Direction-of-arrival (DoA) estimation is a fundamental array processing task that has benefited substantially from deep learning. Deploying such methods across distributed edge devices introduces privacy and communication constraints that federated learning (FL) can address. Yet, standard FL algorithms treat DoA as a generic classification problem, ignoring the underlying physics of the array manifold. To address this, we propose a physics-informed FL framework for DoA estimation that incorporates steering-vector geometry directly into the local training objective via a manifold-aware regularizer. Unlike existing FL baselines, the regularizer in our framework penalizes discrepancies in steering space rather than label space, exploiting the known geometric structure of the array manifold. We provide theoretical convergence guarantees for our framework, showing convergence to a stationary point. Simulation results confirm that our physics informed approach outperforms multiple FL baseline approaches across iid and non-iid data conditions.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: physics-informed framework for DoA estimation in communication systems
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通信系统中用于DOA估计的物理信息框架
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通信系统中用于DOA估计的物理信息框架
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通信系统中用于DOA估计的物理信息框架
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a physics-informed federated learning framework for DoA estimation that incorporates steering-vector geometry into the training objective.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 传统联邦学习在分布式DOA估计中忽略了阵列流形的物理约束。本文提出一种物理信息联邦学习框架，通过流形感知正则化项将导向矢量几何融入本地训练目标，使模型在标签空间之外惩罚导向空间的不一致性。该方法在保持隐私的同时提升了DOA估计精度，展示了物理信息方法在通信信号处理中的潜力。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 传统联邦学习在分布式DOA估计中忽略了阵列流形的物理约束。本文提出一种物理信息联邦学习框架，通过流形感知正则化项将导向矢量几何融入本地训练目标，使模型在标签空间之外惩罚导向空间的不一致性。该方法在保持隐私的同时提升了DOA估计精度，展示了物理信息方法在通信信号处理中的潜力。

quick_skim.title: AirTF: Over-the-Air Token Fusion for Task-Oriented Multi-Modal Token Communications
quick_skim.abstract: In the Internet of Vehicles (IoV), transmitting high-dimensional multi-modal sensory data to edge servers for time-sensitive tasks faces severe spectrum bottlenecks. To address this, we propose a foundation model-driven over-the-air token fusion (AirTF) framework for task-oriented multi-modal token communications. Unlike existing schemes for segmentation that rely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with limited local receptive fields, AirTF leverages vision transformer (ViT) encoders to extract globally contextualized semantic tokens from distributed heterogeneous sensors. By concurrently transmitting these spatially aligned tokens over a shared wireless channel, our framework exploits the superposition property of the multiple access channel to inherently fuse complementary multi-modal semantics (e.g., RGB and infrared) directly over the air. This mechanism significantly enhances spectral efficiency compared to orthogonal transmission. Furthermore, the integration of a pre-trained foundation model provides critical visual priors, effectively addressing the data-hungry nature of ViTs on limited, scenario-specific semantic segmentation datasets. Experiments demonstrate that AirTF consistently outperforms orthogonal transmission and CNN-based fusion baselines across AWGN and fading channels. Additional evaluations under a three-user setting, residual synchronization errors, and imperfect channel state information estimation further confirm its robustness. The source code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: task-oriented communication with ViT over wireless channel
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用视觉变压器进行任务导向无线通信
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用视觉变压器进行任务导向无线通信
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用视觉变压器进行任务导向无线通信
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: AirTF uses vision transformer encoders for over-the-air token fusion in multi-modal communications, addressing spectrum bottlenecks via superposition property of multiple access channel.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对车联网中高维多模态数据传输的频谱瓶颈问题，提出了一种基于基础模型的空中令牌融合框架AirTF。与传统使用卷积神经网络的方法不同，AirTF利用视觉变压器编码器提取全局上下文语义令牌，并通过同时传输空间对齐的令牌利用多址接入的叠加特性。实验表明该框架能有效降低通信负载，适用于实时性任务。

quick_skim.title: Seeing Through WiFi: Lightweight Human Pose Estimation with Dynamic Kernel Attention
quick_skim.abstract: WiFi-based human pose estimation (HPE) enables the detection and interpretation of human body positions and movements without the need for wearable devices while preserving individual privacy concerns. Implementing this solution requires enhancing model performance and maintaining efficiency, especially on resource-constrained devices. This paper introduces a novel framework, WiLHPE, for lightweight and efficient human pose estimation using WiFi CSI signals. Empowered by a camera-based model during training, WiLHPE processes raw WiFi signals directly to estimate human poses in the testing phase. It employs a novel neural network architecture to dynamically learn convolutional kernels and apply attention mechanisms across channel and frequency spaces. This innovative method diversifies the kernels to improve the recognition capabilities of WiFi signals without adding complexity, ensuring efficiency. Additionally, the Tree-Structured Parzen Estimator algorithm is employed to optimize the critical hyperparameters of the neural network efficiently, minimizing the time required for optimal hyperparameter search compared to heuristic methods. Results from experiments on both the MM-Fi and WiPose datasets highlight the superiority of WiLHPE over state-of-the-art approaches, achieving 85.96% and 94.27% at PCK50, respectively, with minimal computational overhead. Notably, WiLHPE performs impressively even under challenging conditions, maintaining around 80% at PCK50 under AWGN noise with an error variance of 0.5.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Uses WiFi CSI signals for human pose estimation with novel dynamic kernel attention neural network, a deep learning application in wireless communications
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用WiFi CSI信号进行人体姿态估计，采用新颖的动态内核注意力神经网络，是无线通信中的深度学习应用
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用WiFi CSI信号进行人体姿态估计，采用新颖的动态内核注意力神经网络，是无线通信中的深度学习应用
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用WiFi CSI信号进行人体姿态估计，采用新颖的动态内核注意力神经网络，是无线通信中的深度学习应用
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces WiLHPE, a lightweight neural network with dynamic kernel attention for WiFi-based human pose estimation, demonstrating efficient deep learning on communication signals.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出WiLHPE框架，用于基于WiFi信号的人体姿态估计。该框架采用动态内核注意力机制的新型神经网络架构，直接处理原始WiFi CSI信号，在保证精度的情况下显著降低模型复杂度。实验表明其能在资源受限设备上高效运行，展示了深度学习在无线通信信号处理中的应用潜力。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出WiLHPE框架，用于基于WiFi信号的人体姿态估计。该框架采用动态内核注意力机制的新型神经网络架构，直接处理原始WiFi CSI信号，在保证精度的情况下显著降低模型复杂度。实验表明其能在资源受限设备上高效运行，展示了深度学习在无线通信信号处理中的应用潜力。

quick_skim.title: Channel-Adaptive Robust Aggregation for Over-the-Air Federated Learning in Heterogeneous Networks
quick_skim.abstract: The growing demand for privacy-preserving, data-intensive applications such as IoT, augmented reality, and autonomous systems positions Federated Learning (FL) as a key enabler in 6G networks. Over-the-Air FL (OTA-FL) leverages the superposition property of the wireless multiple access channel for efficient aggregation via simultaneous transmissions. Existing methods rely on fixed aggregation schedules and do not jointly address noise, fading, and client heterogeneity. We propose CHARGE-FL (CHannel-Adaptive Robust agGrEgation), a framework that adaptively schedules aggregation based on channel dynamics and application readiness. By combining a tailored optimization strategy with a dual-purpose precoding mechanism, CHARGE-FL mitigates channel distortion and bias from partial updates, achieving superior accuracy, stability, and convergence under realistic wireless conditions. Empirical results under realistic wireless conditions show that CHARGE-FL significantly improves accuracy, stability, and convergence over state-of-the-art OTA-FL methods, particularly in straggler-prone and noisy scenarios.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: channel-adaptive aggregation framework for over-the-air federated learning, uses deep learning for communication
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 针对空中联邦学习的信道自适应聚合框架，将深度学习用于通信
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 针对空中联邦学习的信道自适应聚合框架，将深度学习用于通信
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 针对空中联邦学习的信道自适应聚合框架，将深度学习用于通信
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes CHARGE-FL, a channel-adaptive robust aggregation framework for over-the-air federated learning, addressing noise, fading, and heterogeneity.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有空中联邦学习（OTA-FL）采用固定聚合策略、无法联合处理噪声、衰落和客户端异质性的问题，论文提出信道自适应鲁棒聚合框架CHARGE-FL，通过联合优化策略与双用途预编码机制自适应调度聚合。该方法提升了异构网络中的学习性能，是深度学习在无线通信中的有效应用。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有空中联邦学习（OTA-FL）采用固定聚合策略、无法联合处理噪声、衰落和客户端异质性的问题，论文提出信道自适应鲁棒聚合框架CHARGE-FL，通过联合优化策略与双用途预编码机制自适应调度聚合。该方法提升了异构网络中的学习性能，是深度学习在无线通信中的有效应用。
